title: trema orientale f. micranthum
intro: Trema orientale f. micranthum, also known as the small-leaved trema or small-leafed nettle tree, is a plant species in the family Cannabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Trema orientale f. micranthum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tinctures or as a dried herb for its medicinal purposes.
